appraisal.description: A tarnished silver funeral bell with a muted clapper and a ribbon faded to coffin-lining grey.

clues.result: The clapper is tied with black thread, yet the bell still vibrates under the lens.
UV light reveals initials scratched inside the bell mouth.
The bell's rim is colder than the handle despite being touched last.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If mishandled, a funeral procession can be heard outside each locked window.

generation.concept_prompt: Local prototype concept for Silver Funeral Bell.
generation.model_prompt: Local procedural prototype model for Silver Funeral Bell.
